headings.text: eMachineShop CAD
What users say about our free CAD
Features
1. Templates of common parts.
2. Manufacturability analysis.
3. Import DXF, STEP, IGES, and images.
4. Instant pricing.
Easy to Use

“The plan was to do only one trailer for our kids’ high school band. Now, high schools around the country want one of our trailers! We now have a two-year waiting list for our trailers, and ALL machined parts come from eMachineShop.”
Jeff H. and Drew T. Custom Trailer Fabricators Edmond, Oklahoma

“When sales took off for the LuxuryLite Ultralight Cot, I had a mold made to produce the parts in high volumes. I now sell Thermarest LuxuryLite Cots around the world using the cot feet designed using eMachineShop.”
Bruce W. LuxuryLite Cots Lake Jackson, TX

“I used eMachineShop to design and build an electronic firing system for professional fireworks displays. Since completing the build, I have used the system at countless shows, weddings, baseball games, and the prestigious Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum Fireworks display.”
Michael T. Professional Pyrotechnician Long Beach, California
Jeff H. and Drew T. Custom Trailer Fabricators Edmond, Oklahoma
Bruce W. LuxuryLite Cots Lake Jackson, TX
Michael T. Professional Pyrotechnician Long Beach, California
As Seen In:
Software Version History
Contact Information

Two smiling men in gray shirts, a clients of eMachineShop, standing close together with a blue truck in the background.
Smiling man wearing glasses and a baseball cap, a client of eMachineShop, against a red background
Smiling man in blue t-shirt, eMachineShop customer, against fence background.

meta_description: Easy to learn FREE CAD software with common part templates, manufacturability analysis, and instant production pricing. Open DWG, DXF, IGES, STEP, and STL.
